description: Specify a name and location for a trace marker. The trace marker will be created within the appropriate Mine Blocks during the marker generation step.

keywords.name: name
keywords.description: Set the name for the trace mafker. This is optional.

keywords.name: id
keywords.description: Specify an ID of an existing marker to trace.

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: Specify a position for a trace marker. The trace marker will be created when the host mine block is activated.
